summary: Recording resolves the live input device, not the launch-time one
fail_hint: AVAudioEngine cached the built-in mic at app launch and ignored AirPods. Inspect AudioInputResolver — must re-query default input at recordStart().
notes: Fixture WAV is generated from an AirPods recording path (or a stereo-mic stand-in clearly different from built-in mic spectrum). The CLI mode bypasses live device selection but the spec acts as a regression guard for the cleanup of '[BLANK_AUDIO]' that whisper emits when the wrong mic is captured.
